mapper.select: SELECT i.id AS device_id, i.name AS device_name, i.station_id, st.name AS station_name, co.region, co.name AS company_name, i.sort_index, i.rated_power_kw, i.status AS raw_status, i.model, i.manufacturer, i.module_temperature_c, i.ambient_temperature_c, crv.pv_output_kw AS station_pv_output_kw, cnt.inverter_count, sg.name AS strategy_name, sg.type AS strategy_type FROM sa_inverter i JOIN sa_station st ON st.id = i.station_id JOIN sa_company co ON co.id = st.company_id LEFT JOIN sa_station_curve_15m crv ON crv.station_id = i.station_id AND crv.biz_date = #{bizDate} AND crv.time_slot = #{timeSlot} LEFT JOIN ( SELECT station_id, COUNT(*) AS inverter_count FROM sa_inverter GROUP BY station_id ) cnt ON cnt.station_id = i.station_id LEFT JOIN sg_strategy sg ON sg.station_id = i.station_id AND sg.status = 'active' ORDER BY co.sort_index, st.sort_index, i.sort_index

SELECT a.id AS alarm_id, a.inverter_id, a.event_time, a.type, a.level AS raw_level, a.description, a.status AS raw_status, i.name AS device_name, i.model, i.status AS device_status, i.station_id, st.name AS station_name, co.region, co.name AS company_name FROM sa_inverter_alarm a JOIN sa_inverter i ON i.id = a.inverter_id JOIN sa_station st ON st.id = i.station_id JOIN sa_company co ON co.id = st.company_id ORDER BY a.event_time DESC
